description: V8 TwodFortTwo Scout/Demoman clean specialist stack. Uses explicit learned phase specialists/chunks only; policy overrides disabled for claims. Raw objective completion is green for Scout/Demoman with the non-windowed Red Demoman option stack; this windowed variant keeps strict explicit Red Demoman return green but still needs a universal full-chain/explicit return router.
known_limits: Blue Scout attack/full score still complete but exceed the strict 20-tick stuck ceiling at 31/28 ticks.

Red Demoman explicit return is strict-green with the mirrored h32 chunk; Red Demoman full chain is strict-green with the fullstate relabeled option. A single universal wrapper still needs a state-aware router to select between those two learned specialists.
This stack is a curriculum scaffold, not the final unified lightweight model.
